001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
004import java.time.LocalDate;
005
006public class NextMilestoneSummary {
007
008  private final String label;
009  private final LocalDate date;
010
011  public NextMilestoneSummary(String label, @Nullable LocalDate date) {
012    this.label = label;
013    this.date = date;
014  }
015
016  public String getLabel() {
017    return label;
018  }
019
020  public LocalDate getDate() {
021    return date;
022  }
023}
